name: Avocado Filled with Crabmeat
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------HERBED MAYONNAISE DRESSING-------------------------
1. In a bowl, combine 1 cup mayonnaise, tarragon, chervil, and chives.
2. Add just enough tomato puree to give the dressing a pourable consistency and delicate color.
3. Set aside.
To make salad:
1. Cut avocados in half and remove seeds.
2. Flake crabmeat and combine with hot pepper sauce, celery, and enough mayonnaise to moisten.
3. Season to taste with lemon juice, MSG, salt, and pepper.
4. Place avocado halves on shredded lettuce.
5. Fill with crab mixture.
6. Sprinkle generously with chopped eggs.
7. Garnish with anchovies, pimiento strips, lemon wedges, tomato wedges, olives, and parsley.
8. Serve dressing on the side.
